---
title: "About"
---

The Sabrhood is a page dedicated to providing our internet neighbors with advanced stats, metrics, and insights in MLB and MiLB.

The Sabrhood's head contributor and anaylst is Tyler Schultz. Tyler is a senior at the University of Florida, working to complete his BA in Sports Management. He works with the ESPN-affiliated sport radio station ,WRUF, by providing insights on-air and to live broadcasters. Tyler plans to persue his Masters of Arts in Mass Communications upon graduation in May.

Follow our Twitter/X \@ [thesabrhood](https://x.com/thesabrhood)!

![](images/Headshot2Final.png){fig-align="center" width="214"}
